releases.title: GPT-4.5 sunsetting June 27
releases.summary: GPT-4.5 will be retired from ChatGPT on June 27, 2026 after a 30-day sunset.

releases.title: GitHub Copilot desktop app reaches general availability
releases.summary: An agent-native desktop home for Copilot (macOS/Windows/Linux) that runs parallel agent sessions across repos, each on its own branch and worktree. Follows the Copilot SDK going GA (embed Copilot's agent engine in your own tools).

releases.title: xAI's Grok V9-Medium nears release; Imagine Video 1.5 ships
releases.summary: Grok V9-Medium (~1.5T params, ~3x the prior production model, coding-focused) is in final training for a mid-June 2026 release. xAI also shipped Grok Imagine Video 1.5, an image-to-video model rendering 720p clips in ~25s.

releases.title: Z.ai (Zhipu AI) releases GLM-5.2 — open-weight, coding-first
releases.summary: A 744B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model (40B active) with a 1M-token context, built for long agentic coding sessions and shipped under an MIT open-weights license. Early reports claim it rivals GPT-5.5 on code at a fraction of the cost (no official benchmarks at launch).

releases.title: Moonshot AI releases Kimi K2.7 Code
releases.summary: A coding-focused upgrade on the 1T-parameter MoE Kimi K2.6 foundation, on Hugging Face under a modified-MIT license. +21.8% on Kimi Code Bench v2 and ~30% fewer reasoning tokens vs K2.6.

releases.title: GPT-5.2 retired from ChatGPT
releases.summary: GPT-5.2 Instant/Thinking/Pro removed June 12; existing chats auto-continue on GPT-5.5.

releases.title: 20+ legal MCP connectors and 12 practice-area plugins
releases.summary: Expands how law firms and in-house teams use Claude across research, contracts, discovery, matter management, and legal aid.

releases.title: Cursor's Composer in-house coding model
releases.summary: Anysphere's frontier agentic coding model — ~4x faster than similar models, finishing most turns in under 30s. Composer 2 launched Mar 19; Composer 2.5 now powers Cursor's Bugbot (review time down to ~90s) and the Cursor 3.7 editor (Design Mode).

releases.title: Claude Opus 4.8 is the new top-tier model
releases.summary: Anthropic's latest flagship — an upgrade for coding, agentic tasks, and professional work.

releases.title: Apple unveils next-gen Apple Intelligence & Siri at WWDC26
releases.summary: At WWDC 2026 Apple showed the next generation of Apple Intelligence and a more capable, AI-powered Siri — with on-device screen awareness and personal context — integrated across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Watch, and Vision Pro.

releases.title: Claude Mythos 5 launches for trusted access
releases.summary: Frontier Mythos-class model on the Claude Developer Platform alongside Fable 5; also suspended June 12 under the same export directive.

releases.title: Anthropic releases Claude Fable 5 (then suspends it)
releases.summary: A Mythos-class model with a 1M-token context, 128k max output, and always-on adaptive thinking — made generally available June 9, then suspended June 12 under a US export-control directive.

releases.title: ElevenLabs' Eleven v3 expressive voice model
releases.summary: Eleven v3 is now the default text-to-speech model — lifelike speech with high emotional range and inline audio-direction tags like [whispers] or [surprised]. ElevenLabs has expanded into music, transcription, and conversational voice agents.

releases.title: OpenAI introduces GPT-5.5
releases.summary: Described as their smartest model yet — faster and built for complex coding, research, and data analysis across tools.

releases.title: GPT-5.3-Codex: most capable agentic coding model
releases.summary: Combines the Codex + GPT-5 training stacks into one unified model for code generation, reasoning, and general intelligence.

releases.title: Windows Agent Runtime + Copilot Platform
releases.summary: Turns Windows into an AI-agent platform; rolling out in preview, with general availability slated for November 2026.

releases.title: Seven new in-house MAI models
releases.summary: Includes MAI-Thinking-1 (reasoning) and MAI-Code-1, tuned specifically for GitHub and VS Code.

releases.title: Azure AI Foundry headlines Build 2026
releases.summary: A central model-routing layer that picks the right model per task so teams aren't locked in — a core theme of Build 2026.

releases.title: Figma ships a native AI design agent
releases.summary: From May 20, 2026, an AI agent became the new entry point for First Draft — exploring, iterating, and refining designs natively in Figma. Figma Make added direct editing, annotations, chat, and PR creation; the Figma MCP server gained Slides support and asset export.

releases.title: Gemini 3 Deep Think for AI Ultra subscribers
releases.summary: Google's top reasoning mode for math, science, logic, and hard multi-step problems.

releases.title: Gemini app gains a personal agent and Daily Brief
releases.summary: The Gemini app added 'Spark' (a personal AI agent), a 'Daily Brief' feature, and a redesigned interface.

releases.title: Gemini Omni — native video creation
releases.summary: A new AI video model that combines text, images, audio, and video as inputs, unveiled at I/O 2026.

releases.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash goes generally available
releases.summary: Released May 19; now GA across Global, US, and EU regions with Gemini Enterprise.

releases.title: Raycast 2.0 — Windows support + system-wide AI
releases.summary: A major rebuild (public beta, May 2026): macOS + Windows, a Liquid Glass UI, system-wide AI dictation, Quick AI (one-off questions) and AI Chat with persistent memory, plus reusable 'Agents' (formerly Presets).

releases.title: Notion turns its workspace into an AI-agent hub
releases.summary: A new developer platform (May 13, 2026) lets teams connect AI agents, external data, and custom code into Notion via Workers + an External Agents API. April updates added agent code execution, voice dictation, and a 50-page context window.

releases.title: Brave's Leo gains agentic browsing + Automatic mode
releases.summary: Brave's privacy-first, browser-native AI assistant added agentic browsing (May 2026) — automating tasks across your tabs without storing page content on external servers — plus an Automatic mode that picks the best model per task.

releases.title: Microsoft Agent 365 reaches general availability
releases.summary: An enterprise control plane for managing AI agents; GA since May 1, expanded at Build 2026.

releases.title: Zed 1.0 ships with native Parallel Agents
releases.summary: The Rust-built, GPU-accelerated editor hit 1.0 (Apr 29, 2026). Its Parallel Agents feature (Apr 22) runs multiple AI agents at once in one window, each on a different part of the codebase — plus external agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI). Open source.

releases.title: DeepSeek V4 — largest open-weight model to date
releases.summary: A preview of DeepSeek's new flagship: V4-Pro (1.6T params, deployable on a single B200 node) and the smaller V4-Flash (284B), both MIT-licensed. Rivals GPT-5.5 / Claude Opus on agentic benchmarks at ~$3.48 per million output tokens.

releases.title: Canva AI 2.0 + the Canva Design Model
releases.summary: Announced at Canva Create (Apr 15, 2026): a conversational design interface where you describe a design in text/voice and get fully editable objects (not flat images), powered by the world's first design-specific foundation model — plus persistent memory and an AI-supercharged Magic Switch.

releases.title: Google releases Gemma 4 open-weight models
releases.summary: Google's open-weight family (sizes ~2B to a dense 31B + a 26B MoE), now under Apache 2.0. Multimodal, 256K context, 140+ languages — the most capable open Gemma yet.

releases.title: Perplexity's Comet AI browser expands (iOS + Enterprise)
releases.summary: Perplexity's AI-native browser — summarize any page, ask follow-ups, and have it run autonomous in-browser tasks (booking, email, forms). Launched on iOS in March 2026 (hit #3 on the US App Store) and is now available for Enterprise with silent MDM deployment.

releases.title: OpenClaw — viral open-source local AI agent
releases.summary: A free, open-source AI agent that runs locally and connects any LLM to your machine — reading/writing files, running shell commands, browsing, email, and messaging (WhatsApp/Telegram/Slack). 100+ skills, bring-your-own-API-key; passed 100k GitHub stars in Feb 2026 (formerly Clawdbot/Moltbot).

releases.title: n8n becomes an AI agent orchestration platform
releases.summary: The automation tool now has a built-in AI Agent builder (memory, tools, guardrails) plus human-in-the-loop approval for AI tool calls. Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, and local Ollama models on the same workflow canvas. Self-hostable.

releases.title: Obsidian's AI plugin ecosystem matures
releases.summary: Obsidian ships no built-in AI, but its open plugin ecosystem now rivals Notion AI: Smart Connections (semantic search + RAG chat), Copilot, Text Generator, and Ollama Chat (local models). Core 2026 updates added the Bases plugin and Siri/Shortcuts quick capture.

releases.title: OpenAI's gpt-oss open-weight reasoning models
releases.summary: OpenAI's open-weight models under Apache 2.0: gpt-oss-120b (near o4-mini, runs on one 80GB GPU) and gpt-oss-20b (near o3-mini, runs on a 16GB device). Weights on Hugging Face — not served via the OpenAI API.

releases.title: Meta Llama 4 — natively multimodal, MoE
releases.summary: Meta's current open generation: Scout (17B active / 109B, a 10M-token context — the largest of any open model) and Maverick (17B active / 400B, 1M context). First Llama with Mixture-of-Experts + native multimodal training.
